name: Trust Deployer CA
description: Installs the deployer's CA certificate in the VE host's system trust store so that skopeo and other TLS clients trust certificates signed by the deployer CA (e.g. registry mirror).

parameters.name: Deployer URL
parameters.description: Auto-injected by backend: deployer base URL for CA certificate download

parameters.name: VE Context
parameters.description: Auto-injected by backend: VE context identifier
